transcript_facts:
- [Assessment] elizabeth is a 66-year-old female with a past medical history of significant for depression and hypertension who presents for her annual exam .
- [Findings] how about your blood pressure ?
- [Findings] i know that we've been in communication and your blood pressures have been running okay .
- [Findings] well , i wan na go ahead and do a quick physical exam , okay ? hey , dragon , show me the vital signs . so here in the office , you know , your blood pressure looks really good , as does your heart rate . so you are doing a good job managing your blood pressure .
- [Findings] so on physical examination , i do n't appreciate any carotid bruits in your neck . on your heart exam i do notice a slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur , which we've heard in the past , so i think that's stable .
- [Findings] hey , dragon , show me the ekg . and the nurses did an ekg before you came in , and that looks perfectly fine , okay ?
- [Findings] and i want you to continue to watch your blood pressures as well , and if they start rising , i want you to contact me , okay ? and for your third problem , for an annual exam maintenance , you know , you're due for a mammogram , so we'll go ahead and schedule that , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] so i know the nurse told you about dax .
- [History of Present Illness] there's been so many events now that we've been able to get vaccinated , i've been able to see my grandkids again , go to more birthday parties , it's been fantastic .
- [History of Present Illness] now tell me a little bit about , you know , we have n't really got a chance to talk about your depression . i know we have n't had you on medication in the past because you're on medication for other things . so i've been going to therapy once a week for the past year .
- [History of Present Illness] you know , i know that you were talking about some nasal congestion . do you have any other symptoms , chest pain , shortness of breath , abdominal pain , nausea or vomiting , anything like that ?
- [History of Present Illness] your lungs in- are nice and clear , and you have some trace lower extremity edema bilaterally , so all that means is , you know , i agree , you know , maybe we should watch your diet a little bit better , okay ?
- [History of Present Illness] so for your first problem , your depression , i think you're doing a really good job with your strategies .
- [History of Present Illness] for your second problem , your high blood pressure , i agree , everything looks fine here now .
- [History of Present Illness] you can set an alarm so that it reminds you to take your medication .
- [Plan] and are you taking the lisinopril that i prescribed ?
- [Plan] i do n't think ... it does n't sound to me like i need to start you on any medication at this time , unless you feel differently .
- [Plan] i wan na just continue on the lisinopril , 20 milligrams a day .
